name: Plumber ☕️
ability: You start knowing the highest number of evil players that any good player neighbours.

name: Yapper ∃
ability: You start knowing a secret phrase. If you said it publicly today, learn an in-play character tonight. The Demon knows the Yapper is in play.
firstNightReminder: Choose a secret phrase. Wake the Yapper and let them know their secret phrase. Put them to sleep. Wake the Demon & show the Yapper token.
otherNightReminder: If the Yapper said their phrase, show them an in-play character token. :reminder:

name: Snowman ™
ability: Each night, choose a player & guess their character type: if you guess wrong, you learn this tonight or up to 2 nights later.
firstNightReminder: The Snowman chooses a player & character type. :reminder: If they are wrong or marked *1 NIGHT AGO*, you may shake your head no. If marked *2 NIGHTS AGO*, you must shake your head no. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Snowman chooses a player & character type. :reminder: If they are wrong or marked *1 NIGHT AGO*, you may shake your head no. If marked *2 NIGHTS AGO*, you must shake your head no. :reminder:

name: Trials ߷
ability: Each night*, the player who suffered the most today might have something good happen to them.
otherNightReminder: A player might have something good happen to them. :reminder:

name: Re-Animator ▫
ability: Each night*, if there are 5 or more players alive, you may choose a player: they are resurrected & drunk, but another player dies.
otherNightReminder: The Re-Animator might choose a player. :reminder: :reminder: :reminder:

name: Attorney ‡
ability: Each day, if you publicly guess the Demon & their character, good wins.

name: Salesman »
ability: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to propose a deal. Tonight, if the Demon accepts it, you lose this ability.
otherNightReminder: Show the Demon the deal. If they accept, act it out accordingly. :reminder:

name: Conductor ‽
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a neighbour: a Townsfolk, if chosen, becomes a Conductor.
firstNightReminder: The Conductor might choose a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Conductor might choose a player. :reminder:

name: Pilot 𓅪
ability: Once per game, during the day, visit the Storyteller with other players: good visitors all die if an evil player visited too.

name: Sandwich Filling ♙
ability: On your 1st day, or if an alive neighbour died since last dawn, you may privately learn something your new alive neighbours have in common.

name: Warrior ∴
ability: You cannot die. If an evil player dies, lose this ability.

name: Revenant ඞ
ability: If you die at night, wake to learn the player most responsible for the current game state.
otherNightReminder: If the Revanant died tonight, wake them & point to the player most responsible for the current game state

name: Shepherd 𝔍
ability: Non-Demons who choose you with their abilities might lose them until you die & learn this.

name: Firebrand ✞
ability: Each day, if you vote, an evil player might act twice tonight.

name: Disguiser ✨
ability: Once per game, a player might register falsely.

name: Poster Child ✦
ability: If you nominate a player, you may not nominate a different player until they die. You may not vote until you nominate.

name: Rook ♤
ability: All Minions know a Rook is in play. If a player publicly guesses you after a vote is tallied, the votes for the nominee count for you instead.
firstNightReminder: Wake the Minions & show the Rook token.

name: Matchmaker ;
ability: Each night, choose a player: they are mad their neighbours are good tomorrow, or might be executed.
firstNightReminder: The Matchmaker chooses a player. :reminder: Put the Matchmaker to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token, the Matchmaker token.
otherNightReminder: The Matchmaker chooses a player. :reminder: Put the Matchmaker to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token, the Matchmaker token.

name: Ghoul 𝒞
ability: Each night, you may choose to swap characters with the Demon: if you do, the Demon doesn't kill tonight.
firstNightReminder: The Ghoul nods or shakes their head. If they nod: Show the *YOU ARE* & Demon tokens. Swap the Ghoul & Demon tokens. Put the old Ghoul to sleep. Wake the old Demon. Show the *YOU ARE* & Ghoul tokens. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Ghoul nods or shakes their head. If they nod: Show the *YOU ARE* & Demon tokens. Swap the Ghoul & Demon tokens. Put the old Ghoul to sleep. Wake the old Demon. Show the *YOU ARE* & Ghoul tokens. :reminder:

name: Machiavellia ∮
ability: Each night, choose 2 players (they learn this): if both are good & one executes the other, your team wins.
firstNightReminder: The Machiavellian chooses 2 players. Put them to sleep. :reminder: :reminder: Wake the targets one at a time. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token, the Machiavellian token.
otherNightReminder: The Machiavellian chooses 2 players. Put them to sleep. :reminder: :reminder: Wake the targets one at a time. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token, the Machiavellian token.

name: Angel’s Trumpet ⚘
ability: Each night*, choose a player: if they won't wake tonight due to their ability, they die & raise a dead player (once).
otherNightReminder: The Angel's Trumpet chooses a player. Put them to sleep. :reminder: :reminder: :reminder:

name: Maw ↬
ability: Each night*, choose a player, they die. Minions you choose replace their ability with this one & live.
otherNightReminder: The Maw chooses a player. :reminder: If that player is a Minion, they lose their ability & gain the Maw ability. :reminder:

name: Fürst 🀤
ability: Each night*, learn an in-play character & an alive player: choose which dies & which is poisoned until dusk.
otherNightReminder: Show an in-play character token & point to an alive player. The Fürst points to the learned player or character. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Endling 𐂂
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If the majority of alive players are evil, an alive evil Minion becomes good (once). [+1 Minion]

name: Belphegor ⚕
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. On the last day, dead players lose their vote tokens. 1 good player knows the Belphegor is in play.
firstNightReminder: Wake a good player & show the Belphegor token. :reminder:
